title: Employment start date
label: When did their employment start?
p1: Tell us when the claimant started working for the respondent.
p2: If you don't know the exact date, then enter their best estimate.

startDate.required: Tell us when the claimant started work. For example, 23 04 2014
startDate.dayRequired: Enter a day for the claimant's start date. For example, 23
startDate.monthRequired: Enter a month for the claimant's start date. For example, 04
startDate.yearRequired: Enter a year for the claimant's start date. For example, 2014
startDate.dayNotANumber: Day must only contain numbers. For example, 23
startDate.monthNotANumber: Month must only contain numbers. For example, 04
startDate.yearNotANumber: Year must only contain numbers. For example, 2014
startDate.invalidDate: You have entered an invalid date. Enter the date using the following format: 22 04 2014
startDate.yearInvalid: You have entered the year in an invalid format. Enter the whole year, for example 2014
startDate.invalidDateInFuture: Date entered must be in the past
startDate.invalidDateTooFarInPast: You have entered a year which is too far in the past
